name: codex-voice
description: Native /voice side-channel for Codex threads; pairs well with OpenScreech STT and Supertonic local TTS.

interface.longDescription: Codex Voice adds per-thread voice summaries for main-thread work plus a local side-channel endpoint for adjacent push-to-talk input. Pair it with OpenScreech for versatile, customizable STT and Supertonic for local TTS, or use ElevenLabs as a hosted TTS alternative. The displayed endpoint records adjacent side-channel messages without starting or steering the main Codex thread.
defaultPrompt: Run /voice on to start a voice side-channel.
Run /voice status to inspect the listener.
